sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48862" key="qiasw=tis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θῐᾰσ-ῶτις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, fem. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θιασώτης</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:4:298" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.298</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
